title: v5.0.4 — Big QoL Update
message:
Tons of quality-of-life improvements.

• Fixed guest login error handling
• Scroll lock now covers ALL popups
• Fixed ghost box on wide screens
• Account panel can't be closed accidentally
• Back button in email sign-in is more visible
• Data Saver moved to Customize panel
• Recently Played can be toggled off
• About section expanded with services, history, and known issues
• APK warns before opening external links
• Various UI fixes
